_comment_top: R6 task 102 (D-H-02, FR-18) — seed row for the FinancialCalculatorHandler typed handler.
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'FinancialCalculatorHandler' (= nameof handler class).
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs.
_comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'FIN-CALC@v1' to descriptive 'FINANCIAL-CALCULATOR'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
sprk_description: Pure deterministic financial math: sum, tax, discount, FX conversion (configured rate table), weighted average, and aggregation by category. All money math uses decimal; mixed-currency operations are rejected. NO LLM call.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat) per user direction 2026-06-08 (audit item 4 Finding B override) — consistent with FR-13..FR-20 acceptance that all 8 typed handlers are chat-exposable. R6 audit item 4 also renamed key from sprk_availableincontexts_value (OData read-only annotation) to sprk_availableincontexts (writable column) per Finding A.
_comment_configuration: Sample default configuration. Per-invocation requests override `operation` / `operands` / `rate` etc.; the `config` block survives as defaults for currency policy + FX rates + rounding.
